text:
The department may adopt safety requirements, rules, and specifications that:

(1) apply to air-conditioning equipment; and

(2) correlate with and conform as closely as possible to recommended practices or standards approved by the Society of Automotive Engineers.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 547. Vehicle Equip.
##### § 547.103 — Air-conditioning Equipment Standards

The department may adopt safety requirements, rules, and specifications that:

    (1) apply to air-conditioning equipment; and

    (2) correlate with and conform as closely as possible to recommended practices or standards approved by the Society of Automotive Engineers.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: The department may adopt safety requirements, rules, and specifications that:
correlate with and conform as closely as possible to recommended practices or standards approved by the Society of Automotive Engineers.
